question: What is the eligibility for MCA at ANUCDE? Master of Computer Applications details.
answer: Eligibility for MCA: Any bachelors degree with 50% aggregate (45% for BC, ST, SC) other than BFA or BOL, with Mathematics at Intermediate or Degree level. Candidates must also have a valid rank in ANUCET Entrance Test, ICET, or any state/central common entrance test. The course duration is 2 years (4 semesters) and the medium is English. [MCA Syllabus](https://anucde.info/material/MCA%20CERTIFIED%20SYLLABUS.pdf)

question: What is the eligibility for MBA at ANUCDE? Master of Business Administration details.
answer: Eligibility for MBA: Any bachelors degree (other than BFA and BOL). Candidates must pass the ANUCDE Entrance Test or have a valid rank in ICET/equivalent common entrance tests. Detailed information can be found in the prospectus. [MBA Syllabus](https://anucde.info/materialMBA%20CERTIFIED%20SYLLABUS.pdf)

question: What are the eligibility and details for MA English at ANUCDE?
answer: Eligibility for MA English: Any Bachelors Degree with English as a subject or one paper in English with at least 100 marks (for professional graduates). The duration is 2 years (4 semesters) and the medium is English. [MA English Syllabus](http://anucde.info/syllabus/3.%20M.A%20-%20English.pdf)

question: What is the eligibility for BA (Economics, History, Politics) at ANUCDE?
answer: Eligibility for BA (EHP): 10+2 or equivalent stream. The duration is 3 years (6 semesters) and the medium of instruction is Telugu. [BA EHP Syllabus](https://anucde.info/syllabus/40.%20B.A%20%28ECONOMICS,%20HISTORY,%20POLITICS%29.pdf)

question: What is the eligibility for B.Com and BBA at ANUCDE?
answer: Eligibility for B.Com (General/Computer Applications) and BBA is a pass in 10+2 or equivalent examination. The duration for these Undergraduate programs is 3 years. Syllabus links: [B.Com General](http://anucde.info/syllabus/58BCOMGENERAL.pdf), [B.Com Computer Applications](http://anucde.info/syllabus/68BCOMCOMP.pdf), [BBA](http://anucde.info/syllabus/164BBA.pdf)

question: What is the eligibility for B.Lib.I.Sc and M.Lib.I.Sc at ANUCDE? Library Science courses.
answer: Eligibility for B.Lib.I.Sc (Bachelor of Library & Information Science) is any bachelors degree. For M.Lib.I.Sc (Master of Library & Information Science), a degree in B.Lib.I.Sc is required. Both programs are 1-year duration. Syllabus: [B.Lib.I.Sc](https://anucde.info/syllabus/80.%20B.L.I.Sc%281%29.pdf), [M.Lib.I.Sc](https://anucde.info/syllabus/14.%20MLISC.pdf)

question: How are classes conducted? Weekend classes and PCP details.
answer: Personal Contact Programme (PCP) classes are typically conducted on Saturdays, Sundays, and public holidays at various Learner Support Centres (LSCs). These classes offer orientation and guidance but do not cover the entire syllabus. Students should check the PCP timetable on the official website: [PCP Timetable](http://anucde.info/pcptimetable.php)

question: How do I get my study material? SLM supply methods.
answer: Study material (SLM) is provided in three ways: 1. In person at the CDE office, 2. By post to the address provided in the application, or 3. Through your allotted Study Centre. It is the student's responsibility to collect material from the study centre if that option is chosen.

question: What is the eligibility for M.Sc. Computer Science at ANUCDE?
answer: Eligibility: Any Bachelors Degree like B.Sc (Computer Science), B.SC (Information Technology), BCA, B.Com (Computer Applications) or B.A. (Computer Applications) or any Bachelors Degree with computers as major or minor stream. Duration: 2 Yrs(4 sems). Medium: English. [Syllabus](https://anucde.info/material/MSC%20C.S.%20CERTIFIED%20SYLLABUS.pdf). [Material](https://anucde.info/msccs.php).

question: What is the eligibility for MA (Hindi) at ANUCDE?
answer: Eligibility: Any bachelors degree with Hindi as second Language/ B.A. with Hindi as Special subject/ Rastra Bhasha Praveena from Dakshin Bharat Hindi Prachar Sabha of Madras / Sahitya Sammalan or Visharad Diploma or Hindi Vidwan program of Allahabad or Hindi Prachar Sabha, Hyderabad. Duration: 2 Yrs(4 sems). Medium: Hindi. [Syllabus](https://anucde.info/syllabus/110.%20M.A%20-%20Hindi.pdf). [Material](https://anucde.info/mahindimat.asp).

question: What are the courses offered by ANUCDE? List of all programs. Available courses at ANUCDE. What can I study?
answer:
ANUCDE offers a total of 14 UG courses and 25 PG courses through Distance Education (ODL/Distance Mode):

**UG Programmes (14 Courses):**
- B.A (Economics, History, Politics)
- B.A (Economics, Pub.Adm, Politics)
- B.A (Economics, Pub.Adm, Sociology)
- B.A (Economics, History, Sociology)
- B.A (Economics, Politics, Sociology)
- B.A (History, Politics, Sociology)
- B.A (Pub.Adm, Politics, History)
- B.A (Spl.English, History, Spl.Telugu)
- B.A (Economics, Banking, Comp.App.)
- B.Com (General)
- B.Com (Computer Applications)
- BBA
- B.Lib.I.Sc (Bachelor of Library & Information Science)
- M.Lib.I.Sc (Master of Library & Information Science)

**PG Programmes (25 Courses):**
- M.Sc (Botany)
- M.Sc (Microbiology)
- M.Sc (Zoology)
- M.Sc (Statistics)
- M.Sc (Chemistry)
- MBA (Master of Business Administration)
- MCA (Master of Computer Applications)
- M.Sc (Mathematics)
- M.Sc (Food & Nutrition)
- M.Sc (Computer Science)
- M.Sc (Psychology)
- M.Sc (Physics)
- M.A (English)
- M.A (Telugu)
- M.A (Economics)
- M.A (Political Science)
- M.A (Sociology)
- Master of Social Work (MSW)
- M.A (Journalism and Mass Comm.)
- M.A (Hindi)
- M.A (History)
- M.A (Sanskrit)
- M.A (Human Resource Management)
- M.Com (Accountancy)
- M.Com (Banking)

[Note: For Diploma, Certificate, and specific specialization details, please contact support or visit the official website.]
